# SakeScan

> SakeScan is an AI-powered sake identification and discovery app. Scan any sake label to instantly identify the bottle, read tasting notes, find food pairings, and explore a database of 50,000+ sakes from breweries across Japan and worldwide.

## About

SakeScan helps sake enthusiasts and beginners alike navigate the world of Japanese sake. The iOS app uses image recognition to read sake labels (including Japanese text), match them to a comprehensive database, and deliver personalized recommendations based on your taste preferences.

Website: https://www.sakescan.com
Contact: https://www.sakescan.com/contact

## Core Pages

- Home: https://www.sakescan.com/
- Explore Sake Database: https://www.sakescan.com/explore
- Blog: https://www.sakescan.com/blog
- City Sake Guides: https://www.sakescan.com/guides
- About: https://www.sakescan.com/about
- Contact: https://www.sakescan.com/contact
- Careers: https://www.sakescan.com/careers
- Privacy Policy: https://www.sakescan.com/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://www.sakescan.com/terms

## Product

- Name: SakeScan
- Platform: iOS
- Category: Sake identification, ratings, and discovery
- Key features:
  - AI label scanning — photograph any sake bottle to identify it instantly
  - 50,000+ sake database with brewery info, rice polishing ratios, and classifications
  - Tasting notes, food pairings, and serving temperature recommendations
  - Personal ratings and tasting journal
  - Explore and search by type (Junmai, Ginjo, Daiginjo, etc.), region, and brewery
- Individual sake pages: https://www.sakescan.com/sake/{slug}
- Brewery pages: https://www.sakescan.com/brewery/{slug}
